statement.en: Diagnostic gap analysis in animal health through combining public databases
statement.summary: This article was submitted to a collection of narrative reviews discusses key research gaps in the control of infectious diseases in animals, informed by two international initiatives: DISCONTOOLS and the STAR IDAZ International Research Consortium on Animal Health (IRC).

proposer: Latifa Elhachimi, Natalia Ciria, Johannes Charlier

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom presents a methodological framework (diagnostic gap analysis via database combination) that is provisionally validated but contingent on: (1) empirical confirmation of gap-closing efficacy across disease domains, (2) data quality/standardization assumptions in public databases, and (3) operational deployment in real animal health systems. Status = preprint/narrative review collection stage, not yet peer-validated as established practice.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 断片化したデータを統合するほど、見落とされた脅威が浮き上がる。
